message:
chore(beads): decompose parallel WAL, fused transaction, and metadata publication epics into granular sub-tasks

Planning decomposition that breaks three major epics into fine-grained sub-tasks
for parallel agent execution:

- D1: Parallel WAL append gate replacement (bd-3wop3.1) split into 5 sub-tasks
  (D1.a–D1.e) covering append-gate removal, per-WAL mutex introduction,
  cross-WAL ordering, reader visibility coordination, and crash recovery

- E2.2: Split-phase prepare/publish fused transaction-entry path (bd-db300.5.2.2)
  split into 4 sub-tasks covering entry construction, prepare-phase isolation,
  publish-phase commit, and rollback/abort semantics

- E3: Reader-visible metadata publication (bd-db300.5.3) split into 4 sub-tasks
  covering schema versioning, metadata fence points, reader snapshot coherence,
  and cross-WAL metadata consistency

Also adds new epic bd-8mvmh (Matrix dominance program — fused transaction entry,
immutable metadata publication) and updates dependency links between existing
issues for correct topological ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
